title: Boost AI context with hybrid search in Spanner
summary: Google Cloud presented hybrid search capabilities in Spanner that combine full-text and vector search for AI-powered applications. The offering integrates with Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform to support retrieval-augmented generation and contextual search use cases.
writeup: This video covers hybrid search in Spanner, which combines full-text and vector search within Google Cloud's database to serve AI-powered applications. The capability integrates with the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform to support retrieval-augmented generation and contextual search. The takeaway: combining keyword and semantic retrieval in a single system aims to improve the context supplied to AI agents and RAG pipelines.
